---
name: "\U0001F4AC Question"
about: Ask a question about LifeOS usage, architecture, roadmap, or contribution
title: "[QUESTION] "
labels: question
assignees: seldonrios

---

## 💬 Your Question
Ask your question clearly and concisely.

---

## 🎯 What Are You Trying to Do?
Describe the goal behind the question.

Examples:
- understand architecture
- choose where to contribute
- validate an idea
- configure a module
- decide between implementation approaches

---

## 🧩 Area
Check all that apply:

- [ ] Project vision
- [ ] Architecture
- [ ] Phase 1 direction
- [ ] Modules
- [ ] AI / reasoning
- [ ] Memory system
- [ ] Automation / workflows
- [ ] API / backend
- [ ] Frontend / UI
- [ ] Contributor onboarding
- [ ] Roadmap
- [ ] Other: _______

---

## 📍 What Have You Looked At Already?
List docs, files, issues, or discussions you checked before asking.

Examples:
- `README.md`
- `docs/README.md`
- architecture docs
- existing discussions
- open issues / PRs

---

## 🔍 Relevant Context
Share any details that help explain your question:
- what you’re building
- your use case
- what confused you
- any assumptions you’re making

---

## 🧪 What Have You Tried?
If applicable, describe what you already attempted.

---

## 🤝 Contribution Interest
Are you asking because you may want to contribute?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] Maybe
- [ ] No
